name: My work slip and fall claim got denied, now what in Utah?
description: Appeal within 20 days with more evidence; get lawyer help.

mainEntity.name: My work slip and fall claim got denied, now what in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal within 20 days with more evidence; get lawyer help.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal the denial within 20 days in Utah workers' comp system.** Common reasons: late reporting or disputed work relation.[3] Key factors: Gather more medical proof, witness affidavits. Request hearing before administrative law judge. Third-party suit possible if applicable. Don't sign releases. Workers' comp lawyers handle appeals free initially.
